components.name: ActionBar
components.description: A flexible horizontal bar for arranging navigation elements, actions, and informational content. Serves as a container with Section, Group, Item, and Separator sub-components for organizing UI elements like breadcrumbs, buttons, and dropdown menus.

props.name: children
props.description: Child elements (ActionBar.Section, ActionBar.Group, ActionBar.Item, ActionBar.Separator)

props.name: className
props.description: HTML class attribute from DOMProps

props.name: style
props.description: HTML style attribute from DOMProps

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing from QAProps

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the action bar section element

sub_components.name: ActionBar.Section
sub_components.description: Container section within ActionBar, used to group items by primary or secondary type.

props.name: children
props.description: Child elements

props.name: type
props.description: Section type for styling

props.name: className
props.description: HTML class attribute

props.name: style
props.description: HTML style attribute

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing

sub_components.name: ActionBar.Group
sub_components.description: Groups items within a section, supports pull alignment and stretch container.

props.name: children
props.description: Child elements

props.name: pull
props.description: Alignment and grow behavior of the group

props.name: stretchContainer
props.description: Whether the container should stretch to fill available space

props.name: className
props.description: HTML class attribute

props.name: style
props.description: HTML style attribute

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing

sub_components.name: ActionBar.Item
sub_components.description: Individual item within a group, rendered as a list item with optional spacing and pull alignment.

props.name: children
props.description: Child elements

props.name: pull
props.description: Alignment and grow behavior of the item

props.name: spacing
props.description: Whether to apply spacing around the item

props.name: className
props.description: HTML class attribute

props.name: style
props.description: HTML style attribute

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing

sub_components.name: ActionBar.Separator
sub_components.description: Visual separator between items, rendered as a list item with separator role.

components.name: AsideHeader
components.description: Main navigation sidebar component providing a flexible and customizable navigation experience. Supports pinned/collapsed states, menu items, panels, footer, logo, top alerts, and compact mode. Uses PageLayout internally for layout structure. Forwards a ref to the inner HTMLDivElement (the aside panel element) via React.forwardRef.

props.name: pinned
props.description: Navigation visual state. When true, the navigation is expanded (pinned open). When false, it is collapsed.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class

props.name: topAlert
props.description: Configuration for a top alert banner

props.name: isCompactMode
props.description: When true, menu items use compact height

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo configuration for the sidebar header

props.name: collapseTitle
props.description: Tooltip title for the collapse button

props.name: expandTitle
props.description: Tooltip title for the expand button

props.name: menuMoreTitle
props.description: Title for the 'more' menu button

props.name: customBackground
props.description: Custom background content

props.name: customBackgroundClassName
props.description: CSS class for the custom background

props.name: hideCollapseButton
props.description: Hides the collapse button

props.name: renderContent
props.description: Render function for the main content area. Receives {size: number}.

props.name: renderFooter
props.type: (data: {size: number; isExpanded: boolean; isPinned: boolean; asideRef: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>; isCompactMode?: boolean}) => React.ReactNode | React.ReactNode[]
props.description: Render function for the footer section. Returns ReactNode for custom content, or ReactNode[] to wrap in FooterBar with layout based on isPinned.

props.name: renderFooterAfter
props.description: Render function for additional content after footer items (e.g., user profile). Receives setCollapseBlocker to block sidebar collapse while a popup is open.

props.name: collapseButtonWrapper
props.type: (defaultButton: React.ReactNode, data: {isExpanded: boolean; onChangePinned?: (pinned: boolean) => void}) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Custom wrapper for the collapse button

props.name: editMenuProps
props.type: {onOpenEditMode?: () => void; onToggleMenuItem?: (changedItem: AsideHeaderItem) => void; onResetSettingsToDefault?: () => void; enableSorting?: boolean; onChangeItemsOrder?: (changedItem: AsideHeaderItem, oldIndex: number, newIndex: number) => void}
props.description: Configuration for menu editing functionality

props.name: onClosePanel
props.description: Callback when a panel is closed

props.name: onChangePinned
props.description: Callback when the pinned state changes

props.name: onMenuMoreClick
props.description: Callback when 'more' menu button is clicked

props.name: onAllPagesClick
props.description: Callback when 'all pages' menu item is clicked

props.name: openModalSubscriber
props.description: Subscribes to modal open/close events

props.name: panelItems
props.description: Array of panel items (drawers) that can be opened from the sidebar

props.name: subheaderItems
props.description: Menu items displayed in the subheader area

props.name: menuItems
props.description: Main menu items

props.name: defaultMenuItems
props.description: Default menu items for reset functionality

props.name: menuGroups
props.description: Menu groups for organizing menu items

props.name: defaultMenuGroups
props.description: Default menu groups for reset functionality

props.name: onMenuItemsChanged
props.description: Callback when menu items are changed (enables All Pages panel)

props.name: onMenuGroupsChanged
props.description: Callback when menu groups are changed

props.name: headerDecoration
props.description: Highlights the top section with Logo and Subheader items

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing

components.name: AsideFallback
components.description: Fallback placeholder component for the aside navigation panel, used as a loading skeleton. Renders a minimal aside shell with optional header decoration and subheader item height reservation.

props.name: headerDecoration
props.description: Whether to show header decoration divider

props.name: subheaderItemsCount
props.description: Number of subheader items to reserve height for

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing

components.name: Footer
components.description: Desktop footer component with horizontal menu items, copyright text, logo, and overflow handling via dropdown. Automatically hides overflowing items behind a 'more' button.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name

props.name: menuItems
props.description: Array of menu items to display in the footer

props.name: withDivider
props.description: Whether to show a divider above the footer

props.name: moreButtonTitle
props.description: Title for the overflow 'more' button

props.name: onMoreButtonClick
props.description: Callback when the 'more' button is clicked

props.name: view
props.description: Footer visual style. 'clear' hides menu items and logo.

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo configuration for the footer

props.name: logoWrapperClassName
props.description: CSS class for the logo wrapper

props.name: copyright
props.description: Copyright text displayed in the footer

components.name: MobileFooter
components.description: Mobile-optimized footer component with horizontal menu items, overflow handling via bottom sheet, copyright text, and logo.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name

props.name: menuItems
props.description: Array of menu items to display

props.name: withDivider
props.description: Whether to show a divider above the footer

props.name: moreButtonTitle
props.description: Title for the overflow 'more' button

props.name: onMoreButtonClick
props.description: Callback when the 'more' button is clicked

props.name: view
props.description: Footer visual style. 'clear' hides menu items and logo.

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo configuration for the footer

props.name: logoWrapperClassName
props.description: CSS class for the logo wrapper

props.name: copyright
props.description: Copyright text displayed in the footer

components.name: FooterItem
components.description: Individual footer item component for the AsideHeader footer area. Extends AsideHeaderItem with layout support for horizontal/vertical modes. Used inside FooterBar or renderFooter.

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout mode: 'horizontal' shows icon only, 'vertical' shows icon and title. Automatically determined by FooterBar context.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the footer item

props.name: title
props.description: Item title text

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon data for the item

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Size of the icon

props.name: current
props.description: Whether this item is currently active

props.name: isExpanded
props.description: When true, forces the item to display in expanded form

props.name: onItemClick
props.type: (item: AsideHeaderItem, collapsed: boolean, event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLElement, MouseEvent>, options: {setCollapseBlocker: SetCollapseBlocker | undefined}) => void
props.description: Click handler for the item

props.name: tooltipText
props.description: Tooltip text shown on hover

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing

props.name: href
props.description: URL that the item links to

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the item element

props.name: hidden
props.description: Visibility flag — when true the item is not shown in the menu

props.name: type
props.description: Item type controlling rendering behavior

props.name: preventUserRemoving
props.description: When true, the item cannot be removed by the user in edit mode

props.name: rightAdornment
props.description: Content rendered to the right of the item label

props.name: itemWrapper
props.type: (p: MakeItemParams, makeItem: (p: MakeItemParams) => React.ReactNode, opts: {isExpanded: boolean; item: MenuItem; ref: React.RefObject<HTMLElement>; setCollapseBlocker: SetCollapseBlocker | undefined}) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Custom wrapper function for the item. Use to render popups or other overlays attached to the item.

props.name: onItemClickCapture
props.description: Capture-phase click handler for the item

props.name: groupId
props.description: The group ID the item belongs to, used for grouped menu rendering

props.name: enableTooltip
props.description: When true, enables tooltip display for this item (inherited from AsideHeaderItem)

props.name: bringForward
props.description: When true, renders the item above the sidebar overlay (inherited from AsideHeaderItem)

props.name: iconQa
props.description: data-qa attribute for the icon element

components.name: HotkeysPanel
components.description: A slide-out drawer panel displaying keyboard shortcuts organized by groups. Supports filtering, custom styling, and platform-specific hotkey rendering.

props.name: hotkeys
props.description: Array of hotkey groups to display

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the panel is open

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback when the panel is closed

props.name: title
props.description: Panel title

props.name: togglePanelHotkey
props.description: Hotkey string displayed next to the title

props.name: filterable
props.description: Whether the search filter is shown

props.name: filterPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the filter input

props.name: emptyState
props.description: Content shown when no hotkeys match the filter

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element

props.name: drawerItemClassName
props.description: CSS class for the drawer content

props.name: filterClassName
props.description: CSS class for the filter input

props.name: titleClassName
props.description: CSS class for the title

props.name: itemContentClassName
props.description: CSS class for each item content

props.name: listClassName
props.description: CSS class for the list

props.name: leftOffset
props.description: Left offset for the drawer panel

props.name: topOffset
props.description: Top offset for the drawer panel

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the drawer

props.name: platform
props.description: Platform for hotkey rendering (e.g., 'mac', 'pc')

props.name: container
props.description: Container element for the drawer portal

props.name: hideVeil
props.description: Whether to hide the drawer backdrop veil

props.name: itemClassName
props.description: CSS class applied to each hotkey list item row. Passed to the underlying List component's itemClassName prop.

components.name: Logo
components.description: Logo component for the navigation sidebar header or footer. Supports icon (SVG or image URL), text, expand/collapse animation, custom wrapper, and link functionality. Spreads remaining LogoProps (including iconSize) onto internal rendering.

props.name: text
props.description: Logo text or render function for custom content

props.name: icon
props.description: SVG icon data

props.name: iconSrc
props.description: Image URL for the logo icon

props.name: iconClassName
props.description: CSS class for the icon element

props.name: iconPlaceClassName
props.description: CSS class for the icon container

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Icon size in pixels. Default depends on isCompactMode.

props.name: textSize
props.description: Font size for the logo text in pixels

props.name: href
props.description: Link URL for the logo

props.name: target
props.description: Link target attribute

props.name: wrapper
props.description: Custom wrapper function for the logo button

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the logo

props.name: isExpanded
props.description: Whether the navigation is expanded, controls text visibility animation

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element

props.name: buttonClassName
props.description: CSS class for the button/link element

props.name: isCompactMode
props.description: Compact mode affects default icon size (24 vs 32)

props.name: placement
props.description: Where the logo is placed, affects styling

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the logo link

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of element that labels the logo link

components.name: MobileHeader
components.description: Mobile navigation header with a burger menu, logo, drawer panels, overlap panel, and top alert support. Manages panel open/close state and dispatches custom DOM events for programmatic control.

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo configuration

props.name: burgerMenu
props.description: Burger menu configuration with items, modalItem, renderFooter, and className

props.name: overlapPanel
props.description: Overlap panel configuration (title, action, renderContent)

props.name: burgerCloseTitle
props.description: Accessible title for the burger close button

props.name: burgerOpenTitle
props.description: Accessible title for the burger open button

props.name: panelItems
props.description: Additional drawer panel items

props.name: topAlert
props.description: Configuration for a top alert banner

props.name: renderContent
props.description: Render function for the main content area

props.name: sideItemRenderContent
props.description: Render function for the side item area in the header

props.name: onEvent
props.description: Callback for panel open/close/toggle events

props.name: onClosePanel
props.description: Callback when any panel is closed

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS class for the content area

components.name: MobileLogo
components.description: Mobile-optimized logo component. Supports SVG icon or image URL, text or render function, custom wrapper, and link.

props.name: text
props.description: Logo text or render function for custom content

props.name: isExpanded
props.description: Whether the navigation is in expanded state

props.name: icon
props.description: SVG icon data

props.name: iconSrc
props.description: Image URL for the logo icon

props.name: iconClassName
props.description: CSS class for the icon

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Icon size in pixels

props.name: textSize
props.description: Font size for the logo text

props.name: href
props.description: Link URL for the logo

props.name: target
props.description: Link target attribute

props.name: wrapper
props.description: Custom wrapper function for the logo

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the logo

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element

components.name: Settings
components.description: Full-featured settings page component with hierarchical menu (Group > Page > Section > Item), search/filter, loading state, mobile view, and selection highlighting. Uses compound component pattern with Settings.Group, Settings.Page, Settings.Section, and Settings.Item.

props.name: children
props.description: Settings structure using Settings.Group, Settings.Page, Settings.Section, Settings.Item

props.name: title
props.description: Settings page title

props.name: filterPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the search filter input

props.name: emptyPlaceholder
props.description: Text shown when no settings match the filter

props.name: initialPage
props.description: Initially selected page ID

props.name: initialSearch
props.description: Initial search filter value

props.name: selection
props.description: Programmatic selection of page/section/setting for highlighting

props.name: onPageChange
props.description: Callback when the active page changes

props.name: renderNotFound
props.description: Render function for not-found state

props.name: renderLoading
props.description: Custom loading state renderer

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether settings are in loading state

props.name: view
props.description: View mode, 'mobile' uses tabs instead of side menu

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback when settings panel is closed

props.name: renderRightAdornment
props.description: Render function for right adornment on each setting item

props.name: renderSectionRightAdornment
props.description: Render function for right adornment on each section

props.name: showRightAdornmentOnHover
props.description: Whether right adornments are only shown on hover

sub_components.name: Settings.Group
sub_components.description: Groups pages together in the settings menu with a title.

props.name: id
props.description: Group identifier

props.name: groupTitle
props.description: Title for the group in the menu

props.name: children
props.description: Settings.Page elements

sub_components.name: Settings.Page
sub_components.description: A page in the settings navigation, rendered in the menu.

props.name: id
props.description: Page identifier

props.name: title
props.description: Page title shown in the menu

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for the page in the menu

props.name: children
props.description: Settings.Section elements

sub_components.name: Settings.Section
sub_components.description: A section within a page, groups related setting items.

props.name: id
props.description: Section identifier

props.name: title
props.description: Section title

props.name: header
props.description: Custom header content

props.name: children
props.description: Settings.Item elements

props.name: withBadge
props.description: Show a badge indicator on the section

props.name: hideTitle
props.description: Hide the section title

sub_components.name: Settings.Item
sub_components.description: Individual setting row with a label and content area.

props.name: id
props.description: Setting identifier

props.name: labelId
props.description: HTML id for the label element

props.name: title
props.description: Setting title/label text

props.name: highlightedTitle
props.description: Pre-highlighted title for search results

props.name: renderTitleComponent
props.description: Custom title renderer. When returns null, label column is hidden.

props.name: align
props.description: Vertical alignment of the setting row

props.name: children
props.description: Setting control content

props.name: withBadge
props.description: Show a badge indicator on the setting

props.name: mode
props.description: Layout mode for the setting

props.name: description
props.description: Description text below the title

components.name: Title
components.description: Title component used in navigation panels and settings. Renders a heading with an optional close button.

props.name: children
props.description: Title content

props.name: hasSeparator
props.description: Whether to show a bottom separator

props.name: closeTitle
props.description: Accessible label for the close button

props.name: closeIconSize
props.description: Size of the close icon in pixels

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback when close button is clicked. Close button only rendered when provided.

components.name: PageLayout
components.description: Layout wrapper used by AsideHeader that manages the expand/collapse state, provides AsideHeaderContext, and handles TopAlert rendering with SSR preload height support. Has a PageLayout.Content sub-component.

props.name: pinned
props.description: Whether the navigation is pinned open

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the layout root

props.name: topAlert
props.description: Top alert configuration

props.name: children
props.description: Layout children (PageLayoutAside and PageLayout.Content)

props.name: onChangePinned
props.description: Callback when pinned state changes

props.name: isCompactMode
props.description: When true, menu items use compact height

components.name: PageLayoutAside
components.description: Aside panel component for use inside PageLayout. Reads size and pinned state from AsideHeaderContext and renders the navigation aside. Accepts all AsideHeaderProps except 'pinned' and 'size' which are provided by context. Must be used inside PageLayout (which provides AsideHeaderContext).

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo configuration for the aside header

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the aside header root

props.name: collapseTitle
props.description: Tooltip title for the collapse button

props.name: expandTitle
props.description: Tooltip title for the expand button

props.name: menuMoreTitle
props.description: Title for the 'more items' button

props.name: topAlert
props.description: Top alert configuration

props.name: customBackground
props.description: Custom background content for the aside

props.name: customBackgroundClassName
props.description: CSS class for the custom background

props.name: hideCollapseButton
props.description: When true, hides the collapse/expand button

props.name: isCompactMode
props.description: When true, menu items use compact height

props.name: renderContent
props.description: Render function for the main content area inside the aside

props.name: renderFooter
props.type: (data: {size: number; isExpanded: boolean; isPinned: boolean; asideRef: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>; isCompactMode?: boolean}) => React.ReactNode | React.ReactNode[]
props.description: Render function for the footer. Returns ReactNode for custom content or ReactNode[] to wrap in FooterBar.

props.name: renderFooterAfter
props.description: Render function for additional content after footer items

props.name: collapseButtonWrapper
props.type: (defaultButton: React.ReactNode, data: {isExpanded: boolean; onChangePinned?: (pinned: boolean) => void}) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Wrapper function for customizing the collapse button

props.name: editMenuProps
props.description: Props for the edit menu mode (sorting, toggling items)

props.name: onClosePanel
props.description: Callback when a panel is closed

props.name: onChangePinned
props.description: Callback when pinned state changes

props.name: onMenuMoreClick
props.description: Callback when the 'more' menu button is clicked

props.name: onAllPagesClick
props.description: Callback when the all pages button is clicked

props.name: panelItems
props.description: Drawer panel items

props.name: subheaderItems
props.description: Items shown in the subheader area

props.name: menuItems
props.description: Main navigation menu items

props.name: defaultMenuItems
props.description: Default menu items used when edit mode resets

props.name: menuGroups
props.description: Menu item groups

props.name: defaultMenuGroups
props.description: Default menu groups used when edit mode resets

props.name: headerDecoration
props.description: When true, adds a decorative element to the header area

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa HTML attribute for testing

components.name: getMobileHeaderCustomEvent
components.description: Utility function that creates a CustomEvent for programmatic control of MobileHeader panels. Use with MOBILE_HEADER_EVENT_NAMES constants and window.dispatchEvent to open, close, or toggle panels.

parameters.name: eventName
parameters.description: Event name, typically from MOBILE_HEADER_EVENT_NAMES (e.g. MOBILE_HEADER_EVENT_NAMES.TOGGLE)

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Event detail payload. MobileHeaderEventOptions: { panelName?: string }

components.name: MobileHeaderFooterItem
components.description: Footer item component for MobileHeader. Re-exported as MobileHeaderFooterItem (from FooterItem). Renders a button with an optional icon and a Sheet modal for panel content. Publishes click events via eventBroker.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon data for the footer button

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Size of the icon

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the button element

props.name: modalItem
props.description: Sheet modal configuration. ModalItem: { visible: boolean; title?: string; id?: string; className?: string; contentClassName?: string; modalAllowHideOnContentScroll?: boolean; renderContent?: () => React.ReactNode; onClose?: () => void }

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the footer button

props.name: eventBrokerMeta
props.description: Metadata passed to the eventBroker on click for analytics

components.name: MOBILE_HEADER_EVENT_NAMES
components.description: Constant object containing the event name strings used for programmatic MobileHeader panel control via window.dispatchEvent. Values: toggleEvent: 'MOBILE_PANEL_TOGGLE', closeEvent: 'MOBILE_PANEL_CLOSE', openEvent: 'MOBILE_PANEL_OPEN'. Use with getMobileHeaderCustomEvent to open, close, or toggle panels.

components.name: FooterLayoutContext
components.description: React context object that provides layout information to footer items. Value type: FooterLayoutContextValue { layout: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'; isExpanded: boolean }. Use as a context provider or read via useFooterLayout hook. FooterItem reads this context to determine its effective layout and expanded state.

components.name: AsideHeaderContextProvider
components.description: React context Provider for AsideHeaderContext. Use to supply AsideHeaderContextType values (pinned, size, isExpanded, onChangePinned, onExpand, onFold, setCollapseBlocker) to a custom PageLayout composition. Required when building custom layouts with PageLayoutAside outside of AsideHeader.

hooks.name: useAsideHeaderContext
hooks.description: Returns the AsideHeaderContext value. Throws when used outside an AsideHeader provider. Provides access to size, pinned, isExpanded, onChangePinned, onExpand, onFold, and setCollapseBlocker.

hooks.name: useAsideHeaderContextOptional
hooks.description: Returns the AsideHeaderContext value or undefined when used outside an AsideHeader provider. Safe to use in components that may exist with or without AsideHeader.

hooks.name: useFooterLayout
hooks.description: Returns the FooterLayoutContext value providing layout direction ('horizontal' or 'vertical') and isExpanded state. Returns undefined when outside a FooterBar.

hooks.name: useSettingsContext
hooks.description: Returns the Settings context value with renderRightAdornment, renderSectionRightAdornment, and showRightAdornmentOnHover. Used inside Settings components.

hooks.name: useSettingsSelectionContext
hooks.description: Returns the SettingsSelectionContext value providing the currently selected page, section, and setting within a Settings component. Used to implement custom highlighting or scrolling to the selected settings item. Returns SettingsSelectionProviderContextValue: { page?: SettingsPage; section?: SettingsPageSection; setting?: SettingsItem; selectedRef?: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement> }.
